Patriots Day Justice Rally – Monday, April 20

📅 Save the Date
Monday, April 20 • 11 AM – 1 PM
1000 District Ave, Burlington, MA

Join us for a special Patriots Day Justice Rally at the ICE detention center at 1000 District Ave, Burlington, MA.

Bring your flag! Bring your revolutionary spirit!

Volunteers Needed

  • Marshals
  • Setup
  • Carpool drivers
